variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 11906 K Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 11906 K Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 11906 K is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P123159 Air Filter, Primary Finned | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11906 K
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Air Filters? Strong, pliable gasket is compressed against the air cleaner housing to create a tight seal. • High-efficiency cellulose media performs across a wide range of heavy-duty engine applications. • Corrosion resistant, coated steel liners support media during operation and help maximize airflow. • Pleatloc™ feature ensures uniform pleat spacing and prevents media from bunching to promote longer service life.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF1956KM Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11906 K
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF1956KM axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
